title: LagBuster
description: LagBuster allows you to keep your server clean and stable.
body:
**LagBuster helps you keep your server clean and stable.**

This plugin removes all items that have fallen on the ground, as well as certain other entities such as arrows, which is ideal for maintaining your server's stability.

The time is adjustable with the commands:
- /clearlag timeset {time in minutes}

It can be enabled and disabled with the command:
- /clearlag {On | Off}

Having trouble? Visit our Discord: https://discord.gg/4DJV7h79fb
